introSection: Batman The Ride is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags St. Louis in Eureka, Missouri, USA. It has been operating since April 22, 1995.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On September 7, 1994, Six Flags Over Mid-America announced that Batman The Ride would be added to the park. The ride opened on April 22, 1995. At the time, it was the first Batman The Ride clone to be mirrored, as well as the first one to feature a different queue line.

On February 1, 2018, it was announced that the attraction would run backwards during the first half of the 2018 season.

fullText:
Batman The Ride is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags St. Louis in Eureka, Missouri, USA. It has been operating since April 22, 1995.

On September 7, 1994, Six Flags Over Mid-America announced that Batman The Ride would be added to the park. The ride opened on April 22, 1995. At the time, it was the first Batman The Ride clone to be mirrored, as well as the first one to feature a different queue line.

On February 1, 2018, it was announced that the attraction would run backwards during the first half of the 2018 season.



Black track and supports.
